title: rubus × vicinus
intro: Rubus × vicinus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or bramble, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content, which helps to protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × vicinus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system function. Rubus × vicinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
